issue.author: RKSimon
issue.body:
Pulled out of a regression report on https://reviews.llvm.org/rGfed28ada47f5 / fed28ada47f5

> > > I haven't done a great job with reducing this - but this shows the effect - https://gcc.godbolt.org/z/5q36ExYqa - loop-vectorize creates the `icmp ne <2 x i64> %24, undef` and then instcombine simplifies it all - but I'm still not certain that LV is at fault or not [@fhahn](https://reviews.llvm.org/p/fhahn/) do you have any suggestions?

> > That's a very interesting case! It looks like this is indeed a LV miscompile. The issue is that we introduce multiple new uses of undef. The issue is that each use of undef could take different values, whereas the code we generate relies that we compare against the same value. See https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/osWdyX for Alive2 showing the issue (the input is a further reduced version of the test case)

> > I think we need to insert a freeze, then broadcast it to a vector and consistently use that in the generated code instead of undef: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/HT7J6u. I can look into a patch for this

> FTR this also is an issue for arbitrary inputs, not just poison/undef constants: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/5BsKqY

CC @fhahn @alexfh

comments.author: alexfh
comments.body: The link to the discussion is broken for some reason. Trying again: https://reviews.llvm.org/rGfed28ada47f56ef775ab966e69a8842dcd315fad

comments.author: alinas
comments.body: Pinging this to (hopefully) get the proposed patch fixes back up to top of inbox for review.

comments.author: rnk
comments.body: It looks like this is still open. @fhahn , mind making a pull request for this now that Phab is readonly?

comments.author: fhahn
comments.body: Will do, with the suggested changes from the original review

comments.author: fhahn
comments.body: Looks like this was closed again by a commit in a for of `llvm-project`, which is a bit surprising. Re-opening again

issue.title: [LoopVectorize] Failure to compare multiple inputs as the same (splatted) value

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-linux-gnu"

define i32 @select_i32_from_icmp(ptr nocapture readonly %v, i32 %a, i32 %b, i64 %n) #0 {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %6, %for.body ]
  %1 = phi i32 [ %a, %entry ], [ %5, %for.body ]
  %2 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %v, i64 %0
  %3 = load i32, ptr %2, align 4
  %4 = icmp eq i32 %3, 3
  %5 = select i1 %4, i32 %1, i32 %b
  %6 = add nuw nsw i64 %0, 1
  %7 = icmp eq i64 %6, %n
  br i1 %7, label %exit, label %for.body, !llvm.loop !0

exit:                                             ; preds = %for.body
  ret i32 %5
}

attributes #0 = { "target-features"="+sve" }

!0 = distinct !{!0, !1}
!1 = !{!"llvm.loop.vectorize.scalable.enable", i1 true}

target triple = "aarch64-linux-gnu"

define i32 @select_const_i32_from_icmp(ptr nocapture readonly %v, i64 %n) #0 {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %6, %for.body ]
  %1 = phi i32 [ 3, %entry ], [ %5, %for.body ]
  %2 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %v, i64 %0
  %3 = load i32, ptr %2, align 4
  %4 = icmp eq i32 %3, 3
  %5 = select i1 %4, i32 %1, i32 7
  %6 = add nuw nsw i64 %0, 1
  %7 = icmp eq i64 %6, %n
  br i1 %7, label %exit, label %for.body, !llvm.loop !0

exit:                                             ; preds = %for.body
  ret i32 %5
}

attributes #0 = { "target-features"="+sve" }

!0 = distinct !{!0, !1}
!1 = !{!"llvm.loop.vectorize.scalable.enable", i1 true}

target triple = "aarch64-linux-gnu"

define i32 @pred_select_const_i32_from_icmp(ptr noalias nocapture readonly %src1, ptr noalias nocapture readonly %src2, i64 %n) #0 {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.inc, %entry
  %i.013 = phi i64 [ %inc, %for.inc ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %r.012 = phi i32 [ %r.1, %for.inc ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %arrayidx = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %src1, i64 %i.013
  %0 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx, align 4
  %cmp1 = icmp sgt i32 %0, 35
  br i1 %cmp1, label %if.then, label %for.inc

if.then:                                          ; preds = %for.body
  %arrayidx2 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %src2, i64 %i.013
  %1 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx2, align 4
  %cmp3 = icmp eq i32 %1, 2
  %spec.select = select i1 %cmp3, i32 1, i32 %r.012
  br label %for.inc

for.inc:                                          ; preds = %if.then, %for.body
  %r.1 = phi i32 [ %r.012, %for.body ], [ %spec.select, %if.then ]
  %inc = add nuw nsw i64 %i.013, 1
  %exitcond.not = icmp eq i64 %inc, %n
  br i1 %exitcond.not, label %for.end.loopexit, label %for.body, !llvm.loop !0

for.end.loopexit:                                 ; preds = %for.inc
  %r.1.lcssa = phi i32 [ %r.1, %for.inc ]
  ret i32 %r.1.lcssa
}

attributes #0 = { "target-features"="+sve" }

!0 = distinct !{!0, !1}
!1 = !{!"llvm.loop.vectorize.scalable.enable", i1 true}

target triple = "aarch64-linux-gnu"

define i32 @select_const_i32_from_fcmp(ptr nocapture readonly %v, i64 %n) #0 {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %6, %for.body ]
  %1 = phi i32 [ 2, %entry ], [ %5, %for.body ]
  %2 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %v, i64 %0
  %3 = load float, ptr %2, align 4
  %4 = fcmp fast ueq float %3, 3.000000e+00
  %5 = select i1 %4, i32 %1, i32 1
  %6 = add nuw nsw i64 %0, 1
  %7 = icmp eq i64 %6, %n
  br i1 %7, label %exit, label %for.body, !llvm.loop !0

exit:                                             ; preds = %for.body
  ret i32 %5
}

attributes #0 = { "target-features"="+sve" }

!0 = distinct !{!0, !1}
!1 = !{!"llvm.loop.vectorize.scalable.enable", i1 true}

target triple = "riscv64"

define i32 @select_icmp(i32 %x, i32 %y, ptr nocapture readonly %c, i64 %n) #0 {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %indvars.iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %indvars.iv.next, %for.body ]
  %a = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %cond, %for.body ]
  %arrayidx = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %c, i64 %indvars.iv
  %0 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx, align 4
  %cmp1 = icmp slt i32 %0, %x
  %cond = select i1 %cmp1, i32 %a, i32 %y
  %indvars.iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %indvars.iv, 1
  %exitcond.not = icmp eq i64 %indvars.iv.next, %n
  br i1 %exitcond.not, label %for.end, label %for.body

for.end:                                          ; preds = %for.body
  ret i32 %cond
}

attributes #0 = { "target-features"="+f,+v" }

define i32 @select_i32_from_icmp(ptr nocapture readonly %v, i32 %a, i32 %b, i64 %n) #0 {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %6, %for.body ]
  %1 = phi i32 [ %a, %entry ], [ %5, %for.body ]
  %2 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %v, i64 %0
  %3 = load i32, ptr %2, align 4
  %4 = icmp eq i32 %3, 3
  %5 = select i1 %4, i32 %1, i32 %b
  %6 = add nuw nsw i64 %0, 1
  %7 = icmp eq i64 %6, %n
  br i1 %7, label %exit, label %for.body

exit:                                             ; preds = %for.body

}

attributes #0 = { "target-features"="+f,+v" }

target triple = "riscv64"

define i32 @select_fcmp(float %x, i32 %y, ptr nocapture readonly %c, i64 %n) #0 {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %indvars.iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %indvars.iv.next, %for.body ]
  %a = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %cond, %for.body ]
  %arrayidx = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %c, i64 %indvars.iv
  %0 = load float, ptr %arrayidx, align 4
  %cmp1 = fcmp fast olt float %0, %x
  %cond = select i1 %cmp1, i32 %a, i32 %y
  %indvars.iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %indvars.iv, 1
  %exitcond.not = icmp eq i64 %indvars.iv.next, %n
  br i1 %exitcond.not, label %for.end, label %for.body

for.end:                                          ; preds = %for.body
  ret i32 %cond
}

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry

  %2 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %v, i64 %0
  %3 = load i32, ptr %2, align 4

target triple = "riscv64"

define i32 @pred_select_const_i32_from_icmp(ptr noalias nocapture readonly %src1, ptr noalias nocapture readonly %src2, i64 %n) #0 {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.inc, %entry
  %i.013 = phi i64 [ %inc, %for.inc ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %r.012 = phi i32 [ %r.1, %for.inc ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %arrayidx = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %src1, i64 %i.013
  %0 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx, align 4
  %cmp1 = icmp sgt i32 %0, 35
  br i1 %cmp1, label %if.then, label %for.inc

if.then:                                          ; preds = %for.body
  %arrayidx2 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %src2, i64 %i.013
  %1 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx2, align 4
  %cmp3 = icmp eq i32 %1, 2
  %spec.select = select i1 %cmp3, i32 1, i32 %r.012
  br label %for.inc

for.inc:                                          ; preds = %if.then, %for.body
  %r.1 = phi i32 [ %r.012, %for.body ], [ %spec.select, %if.then ]
  %inc = add nuw nsw i64 %i.013, 1
  %exitcond.not = icmp eq i64 %inc, %n
  br i1 %exitcond.not, label %for.end.loopexit, label %for.body

for.end.loopexit:                                 ; preds = %for.inc
  %r.1.lcssa = phi i32 [ %r.1, %for.inc ]
  ret i32 %r.1.lcssa
}

attributes #0 = { "target-features"="+f,+v" }

define i32 @pred_select_const_i32_from_icmp(ptr noalias nocapture readonly %src1, ptr noalias nocapture readonly %src2, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.inc, %entry
  %i.013 = phi i64 [ %inc, %for.inc ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %r.012 = phi i32 [ %r.1, %for.inc ], [ 0, %entry ]
  %arrayidx = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %src1, i64 %i.013
  %0 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx, align 4
  %cmp1 = icmp sgt i32 %0, 35
  br i1 %cmp1, label %if.then, label %for.inc

if.then:                                          ; preds = %for.body
  %arrayidx2 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %src2, i64 %i.013
  %1 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx2, align 4
  %cmp3 = icmp eq i32 %1, 2
  %spec.select = select i1 %cmp3, i32 1, i32 %r.012
  br label %for.inc

for.inc:                                          ; preds = %if.then, %for.body
  %r.1 = phi i32 [ %r.012, %for.body ], [ %spec.select, %if.then ]
  %inc = add nuw nsw i64 %i.013, 1
  %exitcond.not = icmp eq i64 %inc, %n
  br i1 %exitcond.not, label %for.end.loopexit, label %for.body

for.end.loopexit:                                 ; preds = %for.inc
  %r.1.lcssa = phi i32 [ %r.1, %for.inc ]
  ret i32 %r.1.lcssa
}

define i32 @select_i32_from_icmp_same_inputs(i32 %a, i32 %b, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %4, %for.body ]
  %1 = phi i32 [ %a, %entry ], [ %3, %for.body ]
  %2 = icmp eq i32 %1, 3
  %3 = select i1 %2, i32 %1, i32 %b
  %4 = add nuw nsw i64 %0, 1
  %5 = icmp eq i64 %4, %n
  br i1 %5, label %exit, label %for.body

exit:                                             ; preds = %for.body
  ret i32 %3
}

define i32 @select_const_i32_from_icmp2(ptr nocapture readonly %v, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %6, %for.body ]
  %1 = phi i32 [ 3, %entry ], [ %5, %for.body ]
  %2 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %v, i64 %0
  %3 = load i32, ptr %2, align 4
  %4 = icmp eq i32 %3, 3
  %5 = select i1 %4, i32 7, i32 %1
  %6 = add nuw nsw i64 %0, 1
  %7 = icmp eq i64 %6, %n
  br i1 %7, label %exit, label %for.body

exit:                                             ; preds = %for.body
  ret i32 %5
}

define i32 @select_i32_from_icmp(ptr nocapture readonly %v, i32 %a, i32 %b, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %6, %for.body ]
  %1 = phi i32 [ %a, %entry ], [ %5, %for.body ]
  %2 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %v, i64 %0
  %3 = load i32, ptr %2, align 4
  %4 = icmp eq i32 %3, 3
  %5 = select i1 %4, i32 %1, i32 %b
  %6 = add nuw nsw i64 %0, 1
  %7 = icmp eq i64 %6, %n
  br i1 %7, label %exit, label %for.body

exit:                                             ; preds = %for.body
  ret i32 %5
}

define i32 @select_const_i32_from_icmp(ptr nocapture readonly %v, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %6, %for.body ]
  %1 = phi i32 [ 3, %entry ], [ %5, %for.body ]
  %2 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %v, i64 %0
  %3 = load i32, ptr %2, align 4
  %4 = icmp eq i32 %3, 3
  %5 = select i1 %4, i32 %1, i32 7
  %6 = add nuw nsw i64 %0, 1
  %7 = icmp eq i64 %6, %n
  br i1 %7, label %exit, label %for.body

exit:                                             ; preds = %for.body
  ret i32 %5
}

define i32 @select_const_i32_from_fcmp_fast(ptr nocapture readonly %v, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %6, %for.body ]
  %1 = phi i32 [ 2, %entry ], [ %5, %for.body ]
  %2 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %v, i64 %0
  %3 = load float, ptr %2, align 4
  %4 = fcmp fast ueq float %3, 3.000000e+00
  %5 = select i1 %4, i32 %1, i32 1
  %6 = add nuw nsw i64 %0, 1
  %7 = icmp eq i64 %6, %n
  br i1 %7, label %exit, label %for.body

exit:                                             ; preds = %for.body
  ret i32 %5
}

define i32 @select_const_i32_from_fcmp(ptr nocapture readonly %v, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %for.body

for.body:                                         ; preds = %for.body, %entry
  %0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %6, %for.body ]
  %1 = phi i32 [ 2, %entry ], [ %5, %for.body ]
  %2 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %v, i64 %0
  %3 = load float, ptr %2, align 4
  %4 = fcmp ueq float %3, 3.000000e+00
  %5 = select i1 %4, i32 %1, i32 1
  %6 = add nuw nsw i64 %0, 1
  %7 = icmp eq i64 %6, %n
  br i1 %7, label %exit, label %for.body

exit:                                             ; preds = %for.body
  ret i32 %5
}

define i64 @pr62565_incoming_value_known_poison(i64 %a, ptr %src) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i32 [ 1, %entry ], [ %add, %loop ]
  %red = phi i64 [ poison, %entry ], [ %select, %loop ]
  %gep = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %src, i32 %iv
  %l = load i32, ptr %gep, align 4
  %c = icmp eq i32 %l, 1
  %select = select i1 %c, i64 %red, i64 %a
  %add = add nuw i32 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i32 %iv, 32
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %phi = phi i64 [ %select, %loop ]
  ret i64 %phi
}

define i64 @pr62565_incoming_value_may_be_poison(i64 %a, ptr %src, i64 %start) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i32 [ 1, %entry ], [ %add, %loop ]
  %red = phi i64 [ %start, %entry ], [ %select, %loop ]
  %gep = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %src, i32 %iv
  %l = load i32, ptr %gep, align 4
  %c = icmp eq i32 %l, 1
  %select = select i1 %c, i64 %red, i64 %a
  %add = add nuw i32 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i32 %iv, 32
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %phi = phi i64 [ %select, %loop ]
  ret i64 %phi
}

define i64 @pr62565_incoming_value_known_undef(i64 %a, ptr %src) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i32 [ 1, %entry ], [ %add, %loop ]
  %red = phi i64 [ undef, %entry ], [ %select, %loop ]
  %gep = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %src, i32 %iv
  %l = load i32, ptr %gep, align 4
  %c = icmp eq i32 %l, 1
  %select = select i1 %c, i64 %red, i64 %a
  %add = add nuw i32 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i32 %iv, 32
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %phi = phi i64 [ %select, %loop ]
  ret i64 %phi
}
